_comment: SDMB park factors by team for VOS Evaluation
_comment_2: Team keys match config/sdmb_orgs.json. All teams use neutral 1.000 raw factors until OOTP park data is supplied

Antelope Valley Raptors._comment: Park factors for Antelope Valley Raptors (SDMB) - VOS Evaluation
Antelope Valley Raptors._comment_2: PLACEHOLDER: neutral 1.000 raw factors until OOTP park data is supplied
Antelope Valley Raptors._comment_3: Each team should have its own park factors file (e.g., park-factors-{team-code}.json)

raw_park_factors._comment: Raw park factors from OOTP - 1.0 = league average

park_profile.description: Placeholder Park registers as a true neutral venue: batting average, extra-base hits, and home runs (overall and by handedness) all sit at league average until SDMB-specific OOTP park data is entered for Antelope Valley Raptors.
key_characteristics: Batting average league average (1.000)
Doubles / triples league average (1.000)
Home runs league average overall and by hand (1.000)
No meaningful handedness asymmetry in the export

tool_adjustments._comment: Multipliers applied to tool ratings. 1.0 = no change, >1.0 = more valuable, <1.0 = less valuable
tool_adjustments._comment_2: All tools 1.0: conversion formulas on 1.000 raw factors yield no adjustment

defense._comment: Neutral park - baseline defensive tool weights

baserunning._rationale_Speed: No extra-base or run-environment tilt in the export
baserunning._rationale_Run: No extra-base or run-environment tilt in the export

pitcher_ability._comment: Neutral park - baseline pitcher tool weights

handedness_splits._comment_2: OOTP export is symmetric by handedness for these factors
handedness_splits._rationale: RHB and LHB HR factors identical at league average

application_rules._comment: Rules for when and how aggressively to apply these park factors
application_rules._comment_prospects: Apply to all players in Antelope Valley Raptors organization, including minors
application_rules._comment_major_leaguers: Apply to players at ML level with this team
application_rules._comment_handedness: Disabled: no RHB/LHB HR difference in export
application_rules._comment_strength_2: At any strength, multipliers remain 1.0 while raw factors stay 1.000

usage_notes.creating_files_for_other_teams: Copy this team entry and adjust raw_park_factors and team_info sections
usage_notes.tuning_adjustment_strength: Start at 0.5, increase to 0.7-1.0 if you want more aggressive park effects

park_profile.description: Placeholder Park registers as a true neutral venue: batting average, extra-base hits, and home runs (overall and by handedness) all sit at league average until SDMB-specific OOTP park data is entered for San Diego Groot.
key_characteristics: Batting average league average (1.000)
Doubles / triples league average (1.000)
Home runs league average overall and by hand (1.000)
No meaningful handedness asymmetry in the export

tool_adjustments._comment: Multipliers applied to tool ratings. 1.0 = no change, >1.0 = more valuable, <1.0 = less valuable
tool_adjustments._comment_2: All tools 1.0: conversion formulas on 1.000 raw factors yield no adjustment

defense._comment: Neutral park - baseline defensive tool weights

baserunning._rationale_Speed: No extra-base or run-environment tilt in the export
baserunning._rationale_Run: No extra-base or run-environment tilt in the export

pitcher_ability._comment: Neutral park - baseline pitcher tool weights

handedness_splits._comment_2: OOTP export is symmetric by handedness for these factors
handedness_splits._rationale: RHB and LHB HR factors identical at league average

application_rules._comment: Rules for when and how aggressively to apply these park factors
application_rules._comment_prospects: Apply to all players in San Diego Groot organization, including minors
application_rules._comment_major_leaguers: Apply to players at ML level with this team
application_rules._comment_handedness: Disabled: no RHB/LHB HR difference in export
application_rules._comment_strength_2: At any strength, multipliers remain 1.0 while raw factors stay 1.000

usage_notes.creating_files_for_other_teams: Copy this team entry and adjust raw_park_factors and team_info sections
usage_notes.tuning_adjustment_strength: Start at 0.5, increase to 0.7-1.0 if you want more aggressive park effects
